scripts.release:auth: npm run guard:auth-architecture && npm run guard:auth-env:prod && npm run guard:hosting-architecture && npm run guard:case-runtime-contract && npm run typecheck && npm run build:functions && npm run lint && npm run test:auth && npm run test:integration && npm run build && npm run test:e2e:auth
scripts.seo:validate-all: npm run ci:seo-gate && npm run seo:validate-routes && npm run seo:validate-raw-html && npm run seo:validate-hreflang && npm run seo:validate-schema && npm run seo:validate-internal-links && npm run seo:detect-near-duplicates && npm run seo:policy-gate && npm run seo:validate-entity && npm run seo:validate-salience && npm run seo:validate-registry-zod && npm run seo:detect-decay && npm run seo:gsc-analytics && npm run seo:sitemap-ssot && npm run seo:sitemap-firewall
scripts.seo:prod-crawl: echo '[SEO-PROD] Live crawl placeholder — implement with Puppeteer cluster'
scripts.seo:prod-contract: echo '[SEO-PROD] Live prod contract placeholder — implement curl-based checks'
scripts.ci:gate: npm run guard:hosting-architecture && npm run guard:auth-architecture && npm run guard:workspace-navigation && npm run guard:case-runtime-contract && npm run guard:github-actions && npm run typecheck && npm run build:functions && npm run lint && npm run lint:seo && npm run test:auth && npm run test:integration && npm run test:commerce && npm run test:cbam-engine && npm run test:reports && npm run build && npm run guard:sitemap && npm run ci:seo-gate
scripts.release:commercial: npm run guard:auth-architecture && npm run guard:auth-env:prod && npm run guard:hosting-architecture && npm run guard:case-runtime-contract && npm run guard:english-only && npm run guard:visual-system && npm run guard:single-product && npm run guard:single-payment-channel && npm run guard:field-help-coverage && npm run guard:sector-adapters && npm run guard:official-sources && npm run guard:calculation-trace && npm run guard:canonical-report && npm run guard:cross-format && npm run guard:sample-report && npm run guard:claims && npm run guard:commerce && npm run guard:workspace-navigation && npm run guard:github-actions && npm run guard:navigation-routes && npm run guard:canonical-email && npm run guard:sitemap && npm run typecheck && npm run build:functions && npm run lint && npm run lint:seo && npm run test:auth && npm run test:commerce && npm run test:sectors && npm run test:cbam-engine && npm run test:reports && npm run test:sample-report && npm run build && npm run guard:sitemap && npm run guard:bundle-scan && npm run test:e2e:commercial && npm run test:e2e:visual && npm run audit:ledger && npm audit --omit=dev --audit-level=high && npm run ci:seo-gate
